zh.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila是Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE的女兒，於1072年出生在義大利西西利亞。她於大約1092年與Guigues III comte d'Albon在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1131年在法國o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila是Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE的女儿，于1072年出生在意大利西西利亞。她于大约1092年与Guigues III comte d'Albon在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1131年在法国o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Altavila
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmela, Carmine, Cosimo, Cosmo, Leonardo, Renato, Rocco, Salvatore.
Italian (Sicily): of Norman origin, an Italianized form of Hauteville (see Havill ).

variants.name: Havill
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from two places in northern France, Hauville in Eure, and Hauteville la Guichard in La Manche.

nameMeanings.name: Matilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila was born in 1072, in Sicily, Italy as the daughter of Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. She married Guigues III comte d'Albon about 1092, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1131, in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila est née en 1072, à Sicile, Italie, fille de Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. Elle a épousé Guigues III comte d'Albon environ 1092, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1131, à Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila wurde 1072 in Sizilien, Italien, als Tochter von Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE geboren. Sie hat um 1092 in Frankreich Guigues III comte d'Albon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1131 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila è nata il nel 1072 nel Sicilia, Italia come figlia di Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. Lei sposato Guigues III comte d'Albon circa 1092, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1131, nel Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavilaは1072年にイタリアシシリアでRoger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILEの娘として生まれた。約1092年にフランスでGuigues III comte d'Albonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1131年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアルボン- ド'アルドeチェで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila(은)는 1072년 이탈리아 시실리야에서 Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1092년 프랑스에서 Guigues III comte d'Albon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1131년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 아드e체 알보- 드'아르드e체에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila nasceu em 1072, em Sicilia, Itália filha de Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. Ela casou-se com Guigues III comte d'Albon aproximadamente 1092, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1131, em Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila родилась в 1072 г. в местности сисиля, Италия. Её отца звали Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guigues III comte d'Albon около 1092 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1131 г. в местности албон- д'ардeч, ардeч, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Matilde de Altavila nació en 1072, en Sicilia, Italia como hija de Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE. Se casó con Guigues III comte d'Albon aproximadamente 1092, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1131, en Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
